name: hud_ui_loading_checkpoint_advance_and_log
description: HudUiLoadingCheckpoint::AdvanceAndLog advances the current loading checkpoint, clamps the index at the max checkpoint, optionally logs a message, calls the zGame logging hook, and updates briefing progress.
known_limits: The caller smoke verifies normal advancement and max-index clamping with a null briefing runtime. The downstream briefing progress transport dispatch is covered by briefing_set_progress_and_sleep_smoke.
VC5SP3 compile-only target coverage exists through hud_ui_mgr_trigger_current_layout_on_activated; Binary Ninja byte comparison remains pending for the HUD loading-checkpoint cluster.
